Configuration.Name: GISANS_L1=20m_L2=2m
Configuration.SetupScript: config.wavelength = 5 config.wavelength_spread = 0.1 config.det = 1200 config.det_offset = 0 config.srce = 180 config.guide = 'ga' config.apx = -215 config.bs = 4 config.beamcenterx = 99.8823 config.beamcenterz = 96.7431 config.drive()
